name: shipflow-marketplace
description: ShipFlow — multi-agent product-dev workflow plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: shipflow
plugins.description: A multi-agent product team in a folder. Solo-dev workflow Discover → Spec → Build → Verify → Ship, coordinated by 20 agents with role embodiment + named methodologies (JTBD / OWASP / CAP / Three-Person Test...). Briefs, stories, ADRs, releases all in-repo as markdown. No SaaS.
